visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand in a brightly lit retail aisle packed with colorful snack boxes. The woman on the left wears a black cold-shoulder top and a pearl necklace; the woman on the right wears a grey patterned bucket hat and a white striped shirt. They wave enthusiastically at the camera, pointing to shelves stacked with Koala's March biscuit boxes. (2) The camera zooms in on large hexagonal gift boxes. The woman in black holds a red-yellow mango flavor box, while the woman in the hat holds a green-yellow pineapple flavor box. They gesture toward the unique packaging and illustrate the size of the boxes with their hands. (3) The scene cuts to a medium close-up of the woman in black holding a small blue box featuring a koala and a soda graphic. The background is blurred but shows the dense retail shelves. (4) The woman in the hat holds up two matcha-flavored boxes: one large family pack and one standard size. The woman in black reappears beside her, smiling and giving a thumbs up. (5) A series of quick panning shots showcases the retail shelf displays, focusing on the various flavors including mango and pineapple, with bright price tags and promotional signs visible.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 小熊餅乾控. [Slogan]: 特殊口味你吃過嗎?. (2) [Subtitle]: 不要錯過這裡. (3) [Subtitle]: 整面都是小熊餅乾. (4) [Subtitle]: 六角的它本來是蓋子變平面. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後我這個是鳳梨的. [Variety]: pineapple. (6) [Subtitle]: 這個是芒果的. (7) [Variety]: 哈哈. (8) [Subtitle]: 它還有漂浮汽水的. (9) [Subtitle]: 看起來就很好吃. [Variety]: 漂浮汽水. (10) [Subtitle]: 妹妹最愛的抹茶. [Variety]: 妹妹推薦. (11) [Subtitle]: 一般款 家庭款. (12) [Subtitle]: 我要大加小 謝謝. (13) [Subtitle]: 我都要. (14) [Slogan]: 你會買哪一款? 留言告訴我哦.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black off-shoulder top. The second woman wears a grey bucket hat and a white vertical-striped short-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A densely stocked retail aisle with shelves full of Koala's March biscuits in various sizes and flavors. Bright price tags and Japanese-style promotional banners (Don Don Donki style) are visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with two high-pitched, enthusiastic female voices speaking rapidly over an upbeat, electronic pop BGM. The energy is high, reflecting excitement. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as the first speaker highlights a specific biscuit box. Her pitch remains high and delivery is fast-paced. (3) A 'pop' bubble sound effect marks a transition as the second female speaker joins, her voice clear and bright, describing the pineapple flavor. The BGM remains constant and rhythmic. (4) Another 'whoosh' transition SFX occurs as they switch to the soda flavor. The vocal intensity swells during the exclamation 'Looks so delicious!'. (5) The final phase features a more direct address to the audience, asking a question with a rising intonation. The BGM sustains its high tempo until a clean fade-out at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Item 1 -> Item 2 -> Item 3 -> Item 4 -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to showcase a variety of limited edition or unique flavors and packaging of Koala's March biscuits found in a retail store (likely Don Don Donki). It utilizes high-energy presentation, colorful overlays, and rapid editing to engage viewers and encourage them to visit the store or share their preferences in the comments.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Visual focus on specific brands (Lotte Koala's March) and verbal recommendations like 'sister's favorite' indicate a promotional or review-style endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity retail vlog focusing on snack variety. The use of vibrant text and 'variety show' style audio effects enhances engagement.
